ItacPersonItem.Notes: The pupil of the astronomer Ticho Brahe, he was librarian of Emperor Rudolph, came to Italy in 1599 and was foreign correspondent of the Lincei between 1604 and 1606.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
